hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "dm-cc-assistant loaded."; if [ ! -f ./CLAUDE.md ]; then echo "  No CLAUDE.md found. Run /dm-cc-assistant:project-init to bootstrap."; elif [ -f .task/backlog.md ]; then IN=$(grep -c "^- \*\*T-" .task/backlog.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); PROG=$(sed -n "/^## In Progress/,/^## /p" .task/backlog.md 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^- \*\*T-" || echo 0); echo "  Backlog: $PROG in progress, $IN total."; if [ -f .task/research.md ]; then echo "  Found .task/research.md from previous research."; fi; else echo "  No backlog yet. Run /dm-cc-assistant:backlog to create one."; fi; echo "  Commands: :project-init | :backlog | :research T-ID | :review | :update-docs"'
